items.title: Amazon might have just leaked a bunch of Grand Theft Auto 6 gameplay details
items.summary:
Grand Theft Auto VI pre-orders are in full swing at Amazon, Walmart, GameStop, and elsewhere, about gazillion people have already secured a copy, and Rockstar still hasn’t even showed us any real gameplay. It hasn’t even really detailed much more than the game world at this point, but Amazon is not only in the midst of its giant Prime Day sale right now, but it also might have just leaked some new tidbits regarding real-time protagonist switching, in-game social network action that ties into secret side missions, and more. 

  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Amazon on PS5 and Xbox.
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at Walmart on PS5 and Xbox.
  • Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders are now live at GameStop on PS5 or Xbox.

For context, the smallest chip architecture prior to IBM’s breakthrough was Intel’s 18A, which is currently being used in its Panther […]

Among the offers, you can find the newest XPress2 Long-Range Step-Thru Cruiser e-bike with $385 in FREE gear at $1,399 shipped, as well as the alternate XPress2 Long-Range High-Step Commuter e-bike with the same bundle at $1,399 shipped. Head below to learn more about this new series and browse the full lineup of deals while they last through the 4-day savings event.

items.title: EcoFlow expands Prime Day Sale with up to 63% power station discounts, bonus savings, FREE gifts, 3x credits, more – all from $142
items.summary: Running parallel to Amazon’s Prime Day event, EcoFlow has officially launched its full Prime Day Sale lineup with up to 63% power station discounts, bonus extra savings, FREE gifts, and 3x EcoCredit rewards. You can find major deals beating out most of the 2026 sale prices we’ve seen, like the 3,600Wh DELTA Pro Portable Power Station that gets a FREE 170W 25K power bank at $1,519.05 shipped, after using the sitewide code 26EFPDAFF at checkout, beating out the station-only Amazon offer by $65. Down from $3,699 directly, since mid-January we haven’t seen much change in price on this model, with it having jumped up to $1,599 until March when it began bouncing between $1,899 and $1,699, with occasional spikes as high as $2,599. Now, not only are you getting much more savings ($1,080 off the going rate, $2,180 off the MSRP) to the second-best price of 2026, but you also get a free RAPID 170W 25K power bank at no extra cost ($80 value). Head below to get the rundown on all the Prime Day promotions and to browse the full lineup of deals.

items.summary: More than half way through Day 3 of the massive Amazon Prime Day sale, and quickly approaching the final 24-hour stretch, you’ll find a collection of the deals in our carts this afternoon down below. From $70 off the best earbuds on the planet and gigantic price drops on a bunch of MacBooks that just got a whole lot more expensive, to extremely rare Amazon all-time lows on Switch 2 games, we also have even lower prices on Anker charging gear, and much more at the ready. Scope out our top 10 day 3 prime Day deals below alongside some must-see offers below that.

items.title: Segway’s GT3 Pro electric superscooter with a monstrous 50 MPH top speed gets first discount to $2,500
items.summary: As part of Segway’s Prime Day EV Sale, which is running alongside the Amazon Prime Day savings event, you can find a first-ever chance at cash savings on the latest Segway GT3 Pro SuperScooter down at $2,499.99 shipped. It’s been keeping to its $2,700 full price since hitting the market back in August 2025, with this being the first discount we have spotted on it in all the time since. For a short time longer, you can score $200 savings off the going rate, setting the bar for future discounts down the road. Be sure to also check out the full Segway Prime Day EV Sale lineup in our original coverage here.

items.title: Anker’s expanded SOLIX Prime Day Sale drops the 3,840Wh F3800 Plus power station to a new $1,985 low, more from $104
items.summary: Running parallel to Amazon’s Prime Day savings event that is in full swing, Anker SOLIX has launched its official complete Prime Day Sale lineup with increased discounts on power stations, bonus savings codes and FREE gifts. One of the biggest upsets during this sale is the 3,840Wh F3800 Plus Portable Power Station down at $1,985.50 shipped, after using the sitewide code USAFF5 at checkout. It’s dropping down from its new $2,499 MSRP since the brand made permanent price cuts in May (originally $4,799), which we’ve seen go as low as $2,199 since it hit the market in early 2025. Now, during this event, it’s not only starting off priced lower than ever, but with the bonus savings code you’re getting a combined $514 markdown off the new going rate ($2,814 off the original MSRP) for a new all-time low price. You can also find the alternate standard F3800 Portable Power Station down at a new all-time low of $1,519.05 shipped, after using the above code. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals while they last.
